title: Extreme Weather + Zombie Survival
description: Combining the power of extreme weather and zombie apocalypse!
body:
Weather and Zombies take over the world, survival is or goal!

Every day a storm has a chance to appear, and at night, Zombies take over the land! You have to craft your survival base, Airplanes & Weapons to survive 


🌪️Mods & Features✈️

ProtoManly's Weather - The skies will be more alive than ever 
Immersive Aircraft - Take to the sky with your Aircraft  
Create - Build machines to help you survive the world
Dynamic Lights - A single torch can light the way 
Just Enough Items - JEI can help find recipes you may not know 
Northstar Redux - Space traveling is now possible
Repurposed Structures - Adventuring is about to get interesting 
Kelka Backpacks - More storage for adventuring
Small Horse Stable - A horse stable is always the best stable 
WI Zoom - Zoom in and spot your next storm 
Tons of Zombie mods - Makes survival much more difficult 
FPS Boosters - This modpack also has a good amount of mods that are meant to help performance

This modpack adds realistic weather and Zombies that kinda keep the vanilla feel of Minecraft.
